testcase.name: tests.test_methods
testcase.error: tests/test_methods.py:8: in <module> api = GreenAPI("", "") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ whatsapp_api_client_python/API.py:52: in __init__ self.session = ClientSession(timeout=ClientTimeout(total=self.host_timeout)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:318: in __init__ loop = loop or asyncio.get_running_loop() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: no running event loop
